title: Department Manager Vacancy at H&M India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at H&M India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!
